message:
feat(discovery): Add SSH config and shell alias parsing for worker discovery

Implements automatic discovery of potential worker machines from:
- ~/.ssh/config - parses Host blocks with HostName, User, IdentityFile, Port
- Shell RC files (~/.bashrc, ~/.zshrc, etc.) - parses SSH aliases

Features:
- DiscoveredHost struct with alias, hostname, user, identity_file, port, source
- DiscoverySource enum for tracking where hosts were found
- Filters out non-workers (github.com, localhost, etc.)
- Deduplication by hostname
- Handles edge cases: wildcards, comments, multiple aliases per line, equals separator

Part of bead remote_compilation_helper-467 (Parse SSH config)
Also partially implements bead remote_compilation_helper-9ga (Parse shell aliases)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
